name: trust_swap
description: Trust-verified token swap. Before returning Uniswap swap calldata, Maiat checks the output token for rug risk (honeypot detection, holder concentration, contract age, Scarab community reviews). Returns trust score + Uniswap quote + unsigned transaction calldata. You sign and submit yourself — Maiat never holds funds. Fee: $0.05 flat + 0.15% Uniswap referral included in calldata.

amount.description: Amount in wei/smallest unit of tokenIn

calldata.description: Unsigned Uniswap tx calldata — you sign and submit

to.description: Universal Router address to send tx to

value.description: ETH value to include (0 for ERC20 swaps)

warning.description: Present if verdict is caution or risky
